name: Pixel Sketch
short_description: Become the best painter in the universe in this colorful online game!
detailed_description:
Pixel Sketch is an online drawing game.

The round starts and you get the theme, the goal is to make a drawing based on the theme in a few minutes using the drawing tools. But you are not alone: other players draw their pictures in front of you! There is a vote for the best picture after the round is over. The most-voted picture wins the game!

- World gallery of Pixel Art
- Friends system
- Voice chat

supported_languages: English, Korean, Russian, Thai, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Swedish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Hindi, Marathi
